stemHtml: How can the precipitation area be described near a quasi-stationary front?

options.a: A wide area on the warm-air side and none on the cold-air side.
options.b: A small line of heavy snow or hail along the line of the stationary front at the Earth`s surface.
options.c: A wide area on the cold-air side and sometimes patchy along the line of the front itself.
options.d: An area of heavy precipitation on both sides of the front but predominantly on the warm-air side.
